title: Vendor in latest container/storage
body:
container/storage now supports remote shares and having a configuration
file.  We need to merge this to demonstrate using buildah with nfs shares.

Signed-off-by: Dan Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: I'd prefer not to change things outside of `vendor` or `vendor.conf` in this PR.  It looks like we need to start vendoring `storage`'s new `github.com/BurntSushi/toml` dependency, too.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/e1876db308ba4ff5d4f8eac382c1fc1add26fae4.1497017009842224896/index.html)
Approved by: nalind
Pushing e1876db308ba4ff5d4f8eac382c1fc1add26fae4 to master...
